content:
守密人，
    非常抱歉，由于问卷配置异常，3月23日09:00~11:30期间，【V2.4.3版本满意度调查问卷】无法正常跳转，现已恢复正常。守密人可以再次通过邮箱内的问卷邮件入口，正常打开问卷并填写。
    对于09:00~11:30期间，收到问卷调研信件但无法填写，且邮件已经删除的守密人，我们将直接为您发放问卷填写奖励，请在邮件内查收。

【补给物资】
异常问题补偿：银芯×200

【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年4月6日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。

**Questionnaire Redirect Failure Fix Announcement**

Keeper
We sincerely apologize. Due to a questionnaire configuration error, the [V2.4.3 Version Satisfaction Survey] was unable to load properly between 09:00 and 11:30 on March 23. The issue has now been resolved. Keepers can once again access and complete the survey through the questionnaire link in their email.
For Keepers who received the survey email during 09:00~11:30 but were unable to complete it and have already deleted the email, we will directly send you the survey completion rewards. Please check your mailbox.

[Supply Inventory]
Abnormal Issue Compensation: Silver×200

[Claim Conditions]
Claim period ends on April 6, 2026, at 23:59. Please remember to visit your mailbox to claim your supply items in time
